title: Jesuh Ka Lung Sungah Hong Lutphet-In

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Ka lungsim hong kikhel pah hi!
Topa Jesuh ka
lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Ka lung sung khua hong vak pah hi!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa Jesuh ka
lung sungah,
Hong tum hong khawl khit phet in-ah;
Tuipi kilok bang ka lung sungah
khuavakna,
Thakhat-in a hong tang pah hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut
phet-in,
Lam ka khial nawn kei pah ding hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Ka
mawh khempeuh hong sawp siang hi!

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Upna a
kip ka ngah pah hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Up khialhna teng bei khin pah
hi!

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Sihna kuam sung khuavak pah
hi!
Topa Jesuh ka lung sungah hong lut phet-in,
Khuapi kong khak kimu pah hi!
